message:
fix(cli): register signal handler before startup and recover panics in summary

Two hardening fixes for the recovery monitor:

1. Move signal handler registration (sigChan + signal.Notify) before the
   startup retry loop. Previously, signals during the ~10s startup phase
   (retry loop + supervisor init + archiver init) would cause an abrupt
   exit without cleanup.

2. Wrap generateEndSessionSummary in panic recovery on both exit paths
   (signal and session-gone). If summary generation panics (e.g., from
   corrupted manifest data), the monitor still performs manifest cleanup
   and exits gracefully instead of propagating the panic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
